---
title: "COVID Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import json
import math
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from IPython.display import HTML, Markdown, display

ROOT = Path(".")
RESULTS = ROOT / "results"
RUNS = RESULTS / "runs"

output_path = RESULTS / "output.csv"
metrics_path = RESULTS / "metrics.csv"
gauge_path = RESULTS / "gauge_output.csv"

df = pd.read_csv(output_path) if output_path.exists() else pd.DataFrame()
metrics_df = pd.read_csv(metrics_path) if metrics_path.exists() else pd.DataFrame()
gauge_df = pd.read_csv(gauge_path) if gauge_path.exists() else pd.DataFrame()

if not df.empty and "date" in df.columns:
    df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date"], errors="coerce")

manifests = sorted(RUNS.glob("*/manifest.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
manifest = {}
manifest_path = manifests[0] if manifests else None
if manifest_path is not None:
    manifest = json.loads(manifest_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

latest_row = pd.Series(dtype="object")
if not df.empty and "date" in df.columns:
    latest_row = df.sort_values("date").iloc[-1]

forecast_rows = []
for horizon in (1, 2, 3):
    forecast_rows.append({
        "Horizon": f"{horizon} week",
        "Forecast": latest_row.get(f"llm_forecast_{horizon}") if not latest_row.empty else None,
        "Lower CI": latest_row.get(f"llm_ci_lower_{horizon}") if not latest_row.empty else None,
        "Upper CI": latest_row.get(f"llm_ci_upper_{horizon}") if not latest_row.empty else None,
        "Category": latest_row.get(f"llm_category_{horizon}") if not latest_row.empty else None,
    })
forecast_df = pd.DataFrame(forecast_rows)

def fmt_num(value, digits=1):
    if value is None or (isinstance(value, float) and math.isnan(value)):
        return "N/A"
    try:
        return f"{float(value):,.{digits}f}"
    except Exception:
        return str(value)

def pill_class(value):
    if value is None or (isinstance(value, float) and math.isnan(value)):
        return "stable"
    return str(value).strip().lower().replace(" ", "-")

def pill_html(value):
    label = "N/A" if value is None or (isinstance(value, float) and math.isnan(value)) else str(value)
    return f'<span class="status-pill {pill_class(value)}">{label}</span>'

observed_cases = latest_row.get("cases") if not latest_row.empty else None
latest_date = latest_row.get("date") if not latest_row.empty else None
latest_forecast_1 = latest_row.get("llm_forecast_1") if not latest_row.empty else None
latest_forecast_1_category = latest_row.get("llm_category_1") if not latest_row.empty else None

metric_cards = [
    ("Latest surveillance week", latest_date.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") if pd.notna(latest_date) else "N/A", ""),
    ("Observed cases", fmt_num(observed_cases, 0), ""),
    ("1-week forecast", fmt_num(latest_forecast_1, 0), pill_html(latest_forecast_1_category)),
    ("Latest run", manifest.get("run_id", "N/A"), f"Rows: {manifest.get('rows_total', 'N/A')}"),
]

cards_html = "".join(
    f"""
    <div class="metric-card">
      <div class="metric-label">{label}</div>
      <div class="metric-value">{value}</div>
      <div class="metric-subtle">{subtle}</div>
    </div>
    """
    for label, value, subtle in metric_cards
)
display(HTML(f'<div class="hero"><h1>COVID Dashboard</h1><p class="section-intro">This page reads the latest forecast artifacts already present in <code>results/</code>. It does not rerun the pipeline.</p></div><div class="card-grid">{cards_html}</div>'))
```

## Forecast Overview

```{python}
if df.empty:
    display(Markdown("`results/output.csv` was not found or was empty."))
else:
    plot_df = df[["date", "cases"]].copy()
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(
        go.Scatter(
            x=plot_df["date"],
            y=plot_df["cases"],
            mode="lines+markers",
            name="Observed cases",
            line=dict(color="#0f766e", width=2),
            marker=dict(size=6),
        )
    )

    if not latest_row.empty and pd.notna(latest_row.get("date")):
        anchor_date = latest_row["date"]
        anchor_cases = latest_row.get("cases")
        forecast_dates = []
        forecast_values = []
        forecast_labels = []
        lower_ci = []
        upper_ci = []
        for horizon in (1, 2, 3):
            forecast = latest_row.get(f"llm_forecast_{horizon}")
            if pd.isna(forecast):
                continue
            forecast_dates.append(anchor_date + pd.to_timedelta(7 * horizon, unit="D"))
            forecast_values.append(forecast)
            forecast_labels.append(str(latest_row.get(f"llm_category_{horizon}", "unknown")))
            lower_ci.append(latest_row.get(f"llm_ci_lower_{horizon}"))
            upper_ci.append(latest_row.get(f"llm_ci_upper_{horizon}"))

        if forecast_dates:
            fig.add_trace(
                go.Scatter(
                    x=[anchor_date] + forecast_dates,
                    y=[anchor_cases] + forecast_values,
                    mode="lines+markers",
                    name="Latest forecast path",
                    line=dict(color="#b54708", width=2, dash="dot"),
                    marker=dict(size=8),
                    text=["Observed"] + forecast_labels,
                    hovertemplate="%{x|%Y-%m-%d}<br>%{y:.1f}<br>%{text}<extra></extra>",
                )
            )
            if all(pd.notna(v) for v in lower_ci + upper_ci):
                fig.add_trace(
                    go.Scatter(
                        x=forecast_dates + forecast_dates[::-1],
                        y=upper_ci + lower_ci[::-1],
                        fill="toself",
                        fillcolor="rgba(181, 71, 8, 0.14)",
                        line=dict(color="rgba(0,0,0,0)"),
                        hoverinfo="skip",
                        name="Forecast CI",
                    )
                )

    fig.update_layout(
        height=430,
        margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=20, b=10),
        legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, x=0),
        paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        plot_bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.92)",
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(title=None)
    fig.update_yaxes(title="Cases")
    fig.show()
```

```{python}
forecast_table = forecast_df.copy()
if not forecast_table.empty:
    for col in ["Forecast", "Lower CI", "Upper CI"]:
        forecast_table[col] = forecast_table[col].apply(lambda v: fmt_num(v, 1))
    forecast_table["Category"] = forecast_table["Category"].apply(pill_html)
    display(HTML('<div class="panel-card"><h3>Latest Forecast Horizons</h3>' + forecast_table.to_html(index=False, escape=False) + '</div>'))
```

## Surveillance Signals

```{python}
if df.empty:
    display(Markdown("Surveillance data unavailable."))
else:
    signal_cols = [c for c in ["ww_mean", "pct_mean", "wastewater_change", "positivity_change"] if c in df.columns]
    signal_df = df[["date"] + signal_cols].copy()
    signal_df = signal_df.melt(id_vars="date", var_name="signal", value_name="value").dropna()
    if signal_df.empty:
        display(Markdown("No surveillance signals were available in the current artifact."))
    else:
        fig = px.line(
            signal_df,
            x="date",
            y="value",
            color="signal",
            height=430,
            color_discrete_sequence=["#0f766e", "#b54708", "#2563eb", "#8b5cf6"],
        )
        fig.update_layout(
            margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=20, b=10),
            legend_title_text="",
            paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
            plot_bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.92)",
        )
        fig.update_xaxes(title=None)
        fig.update_yaxes(title=None)
        fig.show()
```

## Risk And Evaluation

```{python}
cards = []

if not gauge_df.empty:
    gauge_display = gauge_df.copy()
    gauge_display["risk_score_1_100"] = gauge_display["risk_score_1_100"].apply(lambda v: fmt_num(v, 1))
    gauge_display["category"] = gauge_display["category"].apply(pill_html)
    cards.append('<div class="panel-card"><h3>Risk Gauge Output</h3>' + gauge_display.to_html(index=False, escape=False) + '</div>')

if not metrics_df.empty:
    metrics_display = metrics_df.copy()
    for col in ["MAE", "RMSE", "MAPE", "SMAPE", "MASE"]:
        if col in metrics_display.columns:
            metrics_display[col] = metrics_display[col].apply(lambda v: fmt_num(v, 2))
    cards.append('<div class="panel-card"><h3>Forecast Metrics</h3>' + metrics_display.to_html(index=False, escape=False) + '</div>')

if cards:
    display(HTML('<div class="two-col">' + "".join(cards[:2]) + '</div>'))
else:
    display(Markdown("Gauge and metrics artifacts were not available."))
```

## Latest Run Metadata

```{python}
if not manifest:
    display(Markdown("No run manifest was found under `results/runs/`."))
else:
    args = manifest.get("args", {})
    rows = [
        ("Run ID", manifest.get("run_id")),
        ("Created UTC", manifest.get("created_at_utc")),
        ("Model", args.get("model")),
        ("Workers", args.get("workers")),
        ("Start date", args.get("start_date")),
        ("Forecast rows", manifest.get("forecast_non_null")),
        ("Fallback rows", manifest.get("fallback_rows")),
        ("Error rows", manifest.get("error_rows")),
        ("Artifacts dir", manifest.get("artifacts_dir")),
    ]
    meta_df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=["Field", "Value"])
    display(HTML('<div class="panel-card"><h3>Latest Run</h3><p class="small-note">Newest manifest selected by modified time under <code>results/runs/</code>.</p>' + meta_df.to_html(index=False) + '</div>'))
```
